description_long: This pastry shop features a two-story brick building with a green, overhanging roof and a wraparound balcony adorned with ornate railings. The ground floor has large windows and a red double-door entrance, while the adjacent single-story section includes a rooftop terrace with white metal tables and chairs. A striped green-and-white awning shades the sidewalk seating area, and a central stone fountain is surrounded by string lights and classic black street lamps. The shop is set on a paved platform, giving it a cozy, inviting urban ambiance. The overall design blends traditional and slightly ornate elements, suggesting a charming, European-inspired patisserie.
description: A two-story brick pastry shop with a green roof, ornate balcony, outdoor seating, and a central fountain, set in a lively urban scene.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, striped awning, outdoor tables, balcony, fountain, and string lights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved balcony, red double doors, and the fountain to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brick wall, rooftop terrace with seating, and minimal architectural detail.
description_view_3: Back angle showing the rooftop terrace, outdoor tables, and the fountain from behind, with the awning partially visible.
attribute_outdoor_seating: Yes, there are several white metal tables and chairs arranged on the sidewalk in front of the shop and on the rooftop terrace. The seating is classic bistro style, with round tables and ornate chairs, arranged for small groups.
attribute_architectural_style: The architectural style is reminiscent of French Quarter or New Orleans Creole townhouses, featuring brick construction, a wraparound wrought-iron balcony, and a green hipped roof. Decorative railings and a striped awning add to the traditional, European-inspired charm.
